visit_summary: Avoid. The toy has broken, detached doors and is completely missing the accessories shown in the promo photo.
alignment_summary: The listing claims the item is in 'Used - Good' condition, but the photos clearly show structural damage with a broken oven door hanging off its hinge and a completely detached bottom door.

mismatches.issue: Stylized promo image shows accessories not included in the sale

reasons.text: The oven door is visibly broken and hanging crookedly off its left hinge.
The bottom compartment door is completely detached from the unit and lying flat on the ground.
The listing includes a highly stylized, potentially AI-generated promo image showing numerous toy cakes and accessories that are not included.
The seller explicitly notes that the internal trays and toy food are missing.

seller_questions: Are the hinges on the oven and bottom doors broken/cracked, or can the doors be snapped back into place?
Does this toy kitchen have any working battery-operated sounds or lights?
seller_message_draft: Hi! I saw the kitchen listing. Are the hinges on the oven and bottom doors broken, or do they just need to be snapped back into place? Thanks!
limitations: We cannot verify if any electronic sound or light features still function.
The photos do not show if the plastic hinges are stripped or snapped off entirely.
The seller's description is highly restrictive regarding pickup terms and questions.
research_recommended: Search for 'Minnie Mouse Magic Kitchenette' to see the original retail price and included parts.
Look up common fixes for snapped plastic toy hinges to see if the doors can be repaired.
future_capability_note: We don't verify prices, recalls, or seller history yet — you'll need to check these yourself. A future version of this product will do that research for you.
